name: novosense
tagline: Precision Isolation and Signal Chain Solutions
description: Novosense Microelectronics is a leading Chinese semiconductor company specializing in high-performance digital isolators, isolated gate drivers, isolated RS-485/CAN transceivers, op-amps, and current sensing solutions. Founded in 2013 and headquartered in Suzhou, Novosense serves industrial automation, automotive electronics, power supplies, and green energy applications worldwide.
longDescription: Novosense Microelectronics Co., Ltd. is a fabless semiconductor company founded in 2013, headquartered in Suzhou, China. The company specializes in developing and manufacturing high-performance analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits with a focus on isolation technology and signal chain products. Novosense product portfolio includes digital isolators achieving up to 5kVrms isolation rating, isolated gate drivers for SiC and IGBT applications, isolated RS-485/RS-232/CAN transceivers, precision operational amplifiers, instrumentation amplifiers, current sense amplifiers, and temperature sensors. All products are designed to meet stringent quality and reliability requirements, with automotive-grade AEC-Q100 qualified versions available for automotive applications. Novosense has established itself as a trusted partner for global customers in industrial control, automotive electronics, medical equipment, power supplies, and renewable energy sectors.

coreProducts.name: Digital Isolators
coreProducts.description: High-performance digital isolators with up to 5kVrms isolation rating, supporting multiple channel configurations, low power consumption, and high speed data transmission for industrial and automotive applications.

coreProducts.name: Isolated Gate Drivers
coreProducts.description: Isolated gate drivers for SiC MOSFETs and IGBTs with high drive capability, fast propagation delay, and robust isolation barriers for power converter applications.

coreProducts.name: Isolated Transceivers
coreProducts.description: Isolated RS-485, RS-232, and CAN transceivers with integrated isolation, enabling robust communication in noisy industrial and automotive environments.

coreProducts.name: Signal Chain Products
coreProducts.description: Precision op-amps, instrumentation amplifiers, current sense amplifiers, and temperature sensors for accurate signal measurement and conditioning in industrial and automotive systems.

industries.name: Industrial Automation
industries.description: Factory automation, process control, PLC systems, motor drives, and industrial communication interfaces requiring reliable signal isolation and robust data transmission.

industries.name: Automotive Electronics
industries.description: Automotive electronics including battery management systems, motor controllers, OBC, DC-DC converters, and in-vehicle networking requiring AEC-Q100 qualified components.

industries.name: Power Supplies
industries.description: AC-DC power supplies, DC-DC converters, UPS systems, and battery chargers requiring isolated gate drivers and precision signal chain components.

industries.name: Green Energy
industries.description: Solar inverters, wind turbine converters, energy storage systems, and EV charging stations requiring high-efficiency power conversion and reliable isolation.

certifications.name: ISO 9001
certifications.description: Quality Management System certification ensuring consistent quality in design, development, and manufacturing processes.

certifications.name: IATF 16949
certifications.description: Automotive quality management system certification required for automotive supply chain, ensuring products meet automotive industry standards.

certifications.name: AEC-Q100
certifications.description: Automotive Electronics Council qualification for integrated circuits, ensuring reliability under automotive temperature and environmental conditions.

certifications.name: UL 1577
certifications.description: Optical isolation safety standard certification for digital isolators, verifying isolation voltage ratings up to 5kVrms.

certifications.name: CQC
certifications.description: China Quality Certification for products sold in Chinese market, ensuring compliance with Chinese safety and quality standards.

seoTitle: Novosense | Authorized Core Distributor | LiTong Electronics
seoDescription: Novosense digital isolators, isolated gate drivers, and isolated transceivers. LiTong is an authorized Novosense core distributor providing technical support, samples, and competitive pricing for industrial and automotive applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized Novosense distributor?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong Electronics is an authorized core distributor of Novosense Microelectronics. We provide direct access to Novosense products with complete technical support, competitive pricing, and reliable supply chain management. Our FAE team has extensive experience with Novosense isolation and signal chain products, enabling us to provide professional design support for your applications. As a core distributor, we maintain inventory of popular Novosense part numbers and can provide samples for evaluation. We also offer technical training and reference designs to help customers accelerate their development cycles.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong sales team to verify specific product availability and to request authorization documentation. Our team can provide manufacturer letters and direct factory support when needed.

faqs.question: What are the key advantages of Novosense digital isolators?
faqs.answer: Novosense digital isolators offer several key advantages over traditional optocouplers and competitors: First, superior isolation performance with isolation ratings up to 5kVrms and working voltage up to 1.5kVrms. Second, excellent EMC performance with reinforced insulation and high common-mode transient immunity (CMTI) exceeding 200kV/us. Third, low power consumption with typical ICC of 1.5mA per channel at 1Mbps, significantly lower than optocouplers. Fourth, high reliability with >50-year isolation lifetime and wide temperature range from -40C to +125C. Fifth, multiple package options including SOP, TSSOP, and DFN to meet different space requirements. The CMOS-based isolation technology provides deterministic behavior and excellent timing characteristics compared to optocouplers.
faqs.decisionGuide: For new designs, choose Novosense digital isolators for better performance and reliability. For legacy optocoupler replacement, select pin-compatible Novosense alternatives. Contact LiTong FAE for cross-reference and migration support.

faqs.question: Does Novosense offer automotive-qualified products?
faqs.answer: Yes, Novosense offers a comprehensive portfolio of AEC-Q100 qualified products for automotive applications. The automotive-grade product lines include: NSi8210-Q1 and NSi8220-Q1 digital isolators with AEC-Q100 Grade 1 qualification (-40C to +125C), NSi6602-Q1 isolated gate drivers for SiC MOSFETs in automotive OBC and DC-DC applications, NSi1050-Q1 isolated RS-485 transceivers for automotive networking, and NSi81x3-Q1 isolated CAN transceivers for automotive BMS and gateway applications. All automotive products are manufactured in IATF 16949 certified facilities and provide complete PPAP documentation support. Novosense automotive products are widely used in EV battery management systems, motor controllers, on-board chargers, DC-DC converters, and automotive gateways.
faqs.decisionGuide: For automotive projects, specify -Q1 suffix products from Novosense. Request PPAP Level 3 documentation from LiTong. Our FAE team can assist with automotive qualification requirements and provide reference designs for common automotive applications.

faqs.question: What is the maximum isolation voltage for Novosense isolators?
faqs.answer: Novosense digital isolators offer various isolation voltage ratings to meet different application requirements: Standard isolation (NSi82xx series) provides 3.75kVrms isolation rating with 600Vrms working voltage, suitable for most industrial applications. Reinforced isolation (NSi81xx series) provides 5kVrms isolation rating with 1.5kVrms working voltage, meeting reinforced insulation requirements for medical and high-voltage industrial equipment. All Novosense isolators are certified to UL 1577 standard for optical isolation safety. The isolation barrier consists of multi-layer silicon dioxide (SiO2) dielectric, providing excellent isolation performance with >50-year insulation lifetime at rated voltage. CMTI (common-mode transient immunity) exceeds 200kV/us, ensuring reliable operation in noisy switching environments.
faqs.decisionGuide: For 480V industrial equipment, choose reinforced isolation (5kVrms rated, 1.5kVrms working). For 240V equipment, standard isolation (3.75kVrms rated) is sufficient. Verify creepage and clearance distances meet your specific equipment standard requirements.

faqs.question: Can Novosense isolators replace optocouplers in existing designs?
faqs.answer: Yes, Novosense digital isolators are designed as drop-in replacements for optocouplers in most applications. The replacement advantages include: Direct pin-to-pin compatibility for many popular optocoupler footprints including 6-pin SOP, 8-pin SOP, and 16-pin SOP packages. Superior performance with higher data rates up to 150Mbps versus typical 1-10Mbps for optocouplers. Lower power consumption (1.5mA per channel vs 5-10mA for optocouplers). Better CTR (current transfer ratio) stability over temperature and lifetime. No LED degradation, providing consistent performance throughout product lifetime. Deterministic propagation delay unlike optocouplers with wide timing variations. Popular replacement models include: NSi8220 replaces 6N137, NSi8240 replaces 6N136, and NSi8050 replaces PC817 in many designs. Novosense provides detailed migration guides and application notes for common optocoupler replacement scenarios.
faqs.decisionGuide: Select Novosense isolators based on your isolation voltage requirement and package. Use Novosense cross-reference tool or contact LiTong FAE for specific optocoupler replacement recommendations. Request free samples for design validation.

faqs.question: What are Novosense isolated gate driver applications?
faqs.answer: Novosense isolated gate drivers are designed for power converter applications requiring isolated gate drive signals: SiC MOSFET drives including NSi6602 with 4A source/6A sink current capability, suitable for SiC MOSFETs in EV OBC, solar inverters, and server power supplies. IGBT drivers including NSi6230 and NSi6238 with 3A source/5A sink current, ideal for industrial motor drives and UPS systems. Dual-channel drivers including NSi6602 with independent primary and secondary sides, providing flexibility for various converter topologies. Primary side controllers including NSi8308x with integrated DC-DC converter, reducing external component count for space-constrained applications. All drivers feature UVLO (under-voltage lockout) protection, desaturated detection, soft turn-off, and active miller clamp for robust operation. The high CMTI (>150kV/us) and reinforced isolation ensure reliable operation in high dv/dt switching environments typical of SiC and GaN applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: For SiC MOSFETs, choose NSi6602 with 4A/6A drive capability. For IGBTs below 600A, use NSi6230. For paralleled IGBT modules, select NSi6238 with higher drive current. Contact FAE for specific recommendations based on your power module and switching frequency requirements.

faqs.question: How does Novosense ensure product quality and reliability?
faqs.answer: Novosense maintains rigorous quality and reliability standards throughout the product lifecycle: Design verification includes comprehensive stress testing, fault injection, and margin analysis during product development. Wafer fabrication takes place in TSMC and other world-class foundries with advanced process nodes. Assembly and test operations are performed in IATF 16949 certified facilities with full traceability. Quality testing includes 100% production testing plus additional screening for industrial and automotive grades. Reliability qualification follows JESD47 standards with temperature cycling, high temperature reverse bias, electrostatic discharge (ESD), and latch-up testing. Automotive products undergo additional AEC-Q100 qualification including early life failure rate (ELFR) and houses qualification. Novosense provides detailed reliability reports, failure analysis support, and continuous quality monitoring. Our in-house reliability lab enables fast problem diagnosis and corrective action implementation.
faqs.decisionGuide: For critical applications, specify industrial or automotive grade with extended temperature range. Request reliability data sheets and quality reports from LiTong. Use Novosense reliability prediction tools for system-level MTBF calculations.
